title: isoptera lissophylla
intro: Isoptera lissophylla, also known as the butterfly tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Rutaceae, native to Australia and New Caledonia. The medicinal properties of Isoptera lissophylla include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Isoptera lissophylla can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
